shortFormVideo.hook: Private AI should start with one safe workflow, not a giant platform rebuild.
shortFormVideo.brief: Open with a small business owner deciding what data should stay private. Show three cards: choose one workflow, classify the data, connect the result to lead flow. Close on the EB28 article URL and the Melbourne Web Studio project brief.
shortFormVideo.cta: Read the EB28 guide or start the Melbourne Web Studio project brief.
